description:
You are a Computer User Support Specialist starting your shift. Respond to the ticket from Rachel Morrison with the subject 'VPN Connection Dropping Intermittently' in the 'IT Support' mailbox at http://localhost:8080 (Credentials: admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!). Send the reply text provided below and update the conversation status to 'Pending'.

Hi Rachel,

Thank you for reporting this issue. Please try these troubleshooting steps:

1. Disconnect from the VPN and restart your network adapter.
2. Clear the VPN client cache under Settings > Advanced > Clear Cache.
3. Reconnect using the fallback server vpn2.acmecorp.com.

Let us know if the issue persists.

Best regards,
IT Support
